projectOverview.name: YiDing_Web
projectOverview.runtimeModel: plain HTML pages loading page-specific CSS and IIFE-style JavaScript globals
projectOverview.dataModel: client-side state; employee seed data is embedded in frontend JavaScript

runtimeLibraries: Source Han Sans VF via CDN
techStack.stylingApproach: plain CSS files split by page/module

currentArchitecture.pageIsolation: each page owns its own CSS/JS set; there is no router or bundler

employeesSubArchitecture.pageController: assets/js/employees-page.js renders shell, manages UI state, handles DOM events and localStorage persistence

currentStateSummary.login: frontend-only temporary admin login; success redirects to home/home.html
currentStateSummary.dashboard: renders dynamic time-based greeting and menu; only the 弈鼎員工 button navigates to another page
currentStateSummary.employees: three-panel management UI with inline editing, tabs, filters, card grid, detail panel, modal flows, attachment workflow and localStorage-backed state
currentStateSummary.editSchedule: standalone schedule editor with generated date columns, manual employee rows and one summary table
unknowns: No server-side API or auth enforcement code is present in the workspace
No build/deploy configuration is present in the runtime source files
